title: Property Consultant - Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd!
